backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Mediatube backend with user profile management, video upload, commenting, subscriptions, and access control via authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming implementation of the app download page feature, listing the relevant frontend files and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mediatube React app, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (including the `/download` route), QueryClient, ThemeProvider, GoogleAuthProvider, and LanguageProvider.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: Popover button component that lets authenticated users add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Video ad overlay component that displays a banner ad with a countdown timer, auto-dismisses after 15 seconds, and shows a skip button after 5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile (hidden on lg screens) with links to Home, Shorts, Upload, Subscriptions, and Profile, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting video filters, zoom, mic selection, music overlay, duration limits, and camera flip, producing a recorded Blob on completion.
Displays a list of comments for a video and provides an authenticated comment submission form, supporting both Internet Identity and Google auth.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card with author avatar, timestamp, optional image attachment, and a delete option (with confirmation dialog) for the post owner.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: Provides a form for authenticated users to create community posts with optional image attachments, showing upload progress and falling back to a sign-in prompt.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A dialog modal that allows users to edit their channel name, handle, and description, with validation and submission via the updateUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: Renders a horizontally scrollable strip of video filter buttons, highlighting the currently selected filter and invoking a callback on selection change.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users select from 7 supported languages, using the LanguageContext to read and update the current language.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky top navigation bar with search (including voice search), auth controls, sidebar, and bottom nav, wrapping all page content.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom-sheet panel for selecting a background music track from a predefined library, with audio preview playback and a 'no music' option.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time profile setup, allowing users to set their name, handle, description, and avatar, with separate handling for Internet Identity and Google auth users.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Displays a sidebar list of recommended videos (excluding the current one) with thumbnails, metadata, and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: A full-screen short-form video card component with autoplay/pause based on visibility, mute toggle, like button, comments drawer, subscribe, and share actions.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: A bottom drawer component for displaying and submitting comments on a reel/video, showing sorted comments with author avatars and a text input for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A share button component that copies a video's URL to the clipboard using modern or legacy fallback methods, with optional icon-only rendering mode.
A subscribe/unsubscribe button component that toggles channel subscription state for authenticated users, supporting compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: A horizontally scrollable section displaying up to 10 trending non-short videos with rank badges, duration overlays, and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: A video card component rendering a thumbnail, duration badge, channel avatar, title, and metadata, with optional subscribe button and channel info visibility control.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A full-featured video player component with play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen controls, and an ad overlay shown before first play of long-form videos.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context provider that manages the user's preferred UI language, persisting the selection to localStorage across sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend `addComment` method and invalidates the comments query for the given video on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the actor and invalidates related playlist queries, showing an error toast on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that calls `adminRemoveVideo` on the actor and invalidates admin dashboard and video list queries, with success/error toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Custom hook managing camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder-based video recording, device enumeration, facing mode switching, and elapsed time tracking with full lifecycle cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the actor and invalidates the `apiKeys` query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with an optional attachment and invalidates community posts query, showing success/error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a playlist with a title and description, invalidates the playlists query, and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post by ID and invalidates both community post queries, with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID, invalidates the playlists query, and shows success/error toasts.
Query hook that fetches the admin dashboard data, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend, refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys, enabled only when the actor is ready and identity is present.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current caller's user profile from the backend, with combined loading state from actor and query.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos for a given channel principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches comments for a specific video by ID.
Query hook that fetches all community posts sorted by newest first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel principal, sorted newest first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMonetizationSta: Query hook that fetches monetization stats for the authenticated user, enabled only when identity is present.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user.
Query hook that fetches the list of videos belonging to a specific playlist.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber principals for a given channel.
Query hook that fetches trending videos without refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: Query hook that fetches a user profile for a given principal, returning null if not found.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: Query hook that fetches metadata for a single video by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: React context provider and hook implementing Google Identity Services (GSI) login/logout with JWT parsing and localStorage session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: Mutation hook that calls the backend `incrementViewCount` for a given video ID and invalidates related React Query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller is an admin by calling `actor.isCallerAdmin()`, enabled only when the actor and identity are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a background music track with a video blob's audio using the Web Audio API, returning the mixed WAV blob along with progress and error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: Mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist via the backend actor and invalidates relevant playlist query caches, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that revokes an API key via the backend actor, invalidates the `apiKeys` query cache, and shows a toast notification on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the backend actor and invalidates the `currentUserProfile` query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: Query hook that searches for videos by a search term using the backend actor, only executing when the term is non-empty and the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: Mutation hook that updates the caller's profile avatar by fetching the current profile, merging in new image bytes, and saving it via the backend actor with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Provides `useSubscribeToChannel` and `useUnsubscribeFromChannel` mutation hooks that call the backend actor to manage channel subscriptions and invalidate subscriber query caches.
Mutation hook that updates the user's profile (name, description, handle, avatar) via the backend actor and invalidates the `currentUserProfile` cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: Mutation hook that uploads a video file to the backend actor with optional progress reporting, converting the file to a `Uint8Array` and using `ExternalBlob` for chunked upload.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: Hook that provides `applyFilterToStream`, which renders a canvas-based filtered and zoomed `MediaStream` from a video element using `requestAnimationFrame` and CSS filters.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts: Hook that wraps the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text search functionality, exposing listening state, transcript, error handling, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map (English, Spanish, and others) for all UI strings used across the app, keyed by LanguageCode.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, CSS custom properties for the dark YouTube-style theme and Mediatube brand tokens, and utility classes like brand gradients and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin-only dashboard page that displays platform stats, a user list, and a video list with the ability to remove videos via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to create labeled keys, view/copy/toggle visibility of existing keys, and revoke them.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Channel profile page that fetches and displays a user's profile, videos, playlists, subscribers, and community posts in a tabbed layout.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community feed page that renders a post composer and a list of community posts with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Renders the Mediatube Copyright Policy page with sections covering content ownership, DMCA takedown process, and contact information, using i18n translations and breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadAppPage.tsx: Displays a marketing page for downloading the Mediatube mobile app, featuring a hero banner, app feature highlights, screenshots, and Android/iOS download buttons.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main home feed with a sticky category filter chip bar and a responsive video grid, showing skeleton loaders while fetching and an empty state when no videos exist.
frontend/src/pages/MonetizationPage.tsx: Displays a monetization dashboard for authenticated users showing earnings stats cards with loading/error states and a refresh button; redirects unauthenticated users to sign in.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Shows the detail view of a single playlist with its videos listed as removable items (for owners), supporting delete playlist via a confirmation dialog and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Lists all playlists owned by the authenticated user as cards with thumbnails, and provides a dialog to create new playlists; shows a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile page with avatar upload, channel info, videos, and community posts tabs, supporting both Internet Identity and Google auth.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Full-screen vertical scrolling reels feed filtered to short videos, with a camera FAB for recording new shorts and navigation to the upload page.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Renders search results for a query parameter using the useSearchVideos hook, displaying a grid of VideoCards with loading skeletons and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Grid listing page for short videos filtered from all videos, with loading skeletons and an empty state when no shorts exist.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Shows videos from all channels the authenticated II user is subscribed to, with unauthenticated and empty subscription states handled.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Video upload form supporting file selection or camera recording, with title/description inputs, short-video detection, music picker, and chunked upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Full-page video player component that fetches and displays a video with its metadata, uploader profile, comments, recommended videos, subscribe/playlist/share buttons, and a collapsible description, with loading skeletons and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a configuration map for seven CSS-based video/image filters (normal, beauty, vivid, b&w, warm, cool, vintage) including display names, CSS filter strings, and emoji icons.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the MusicTrack interface and a static MUSIC_LIBRARY array containing five royalty-free background music tracks with metadata (id, name, artist, URL, duration).
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides two utility functions: convertBlobToDataURL converts a Uint8Array image to a base64 data URL with MIME-type detection, and getInitials extracts initials from a display name string.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports three formatting utilities: formatViewCount (abbreviates numbers to K/M), formatTimeAgo (converts nanosecond timestamps to relative time strings), and formatDuration (formats seconds into HH:MM:SS or MM:SS).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with YouTube-style and Mediatube brand color tokens, shadcn semantic colors, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and fade/accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the Mediatube project version, existing features (app download page), image requirements, and build configuration flags.
